name: Bill Hader
blurb: An impressionist and character ace best known for Stefon.
bio: Bill Hader is an American comedian, actor, and writer who spent eight seasons on Saturday Night Live (2005-2013), where his flustered Weekend Update character Stefon became a fan favorite. He later created and starred in the acclaimed HBO series Barry.

bits.t: Weekend Update: Stefon on Summer's Hottest Tips
Weekend Update: Stefon on Summer's Hottest Tips
